title: Pokeballs to the Walls
description: Cobblemon addon that ports Gravelmon Poke Balls and adds orange and purple apricorns without the Gravelmon or GEB dependency.
body:
# Pokeballs to the Walls (PBTW)

Standalone Cobblemon addon that ports a curated set of Gravelmon Poke Balls and adds orange and purple apricorns. No Gravelmon or GEB dependency.

## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.1 (NeoForge)
- Cobblemon (required)

## What This Mod Adds
- 36 custom Poke Balls with Cobblemon-registered ball keys and matching behaviors from Gravelmon.
- Nuzlocke-style permadeath for Pokemon caught in the Nuzlocke Ball.
- Orange and purple apricorn trees, items, seeds, saplings, loot, tags, and worldgen.
- Optional compat: DynamicTrees + dtcobblemon (treepack).
- Optional compat: Create: Cobblemon Balls Overhaul (Create-style ball recipes).

## Behavior Notes
- If Gravelmon is installed, PBTW disables itself entirely to avoid conflicts.
- PBTW does not override any existing Cobblemon ball IDs.
- Items are `pbtw:<ballname>` while the Cobblemon ball keys are `cobblemon:<ballname>`.

## Configuration (Server)
- `enableBalls` (default true)
- `enableApricorns` (default true)
- `enableWorldgen` (default true)
- `enableDynamicTreesCompat` (default true)
- `enableCreateCompatRecipes` (default true)

## Credits
- Ball art and base recipes ported from Gravelmon for compatibility with Cobblemon.
